name: HACL*
use: dist/ pre-extracted C (no F* toolchain needed at build time)
description: Formally verified crypto (MSR). Primary independent oracle for SHA, HMAC, HKDF, X25519, Ed25519, AES-GCM, ChaCha20.
verification: Formally verified in F* and extracted to C via KaRaMeL
note: Use hacl-star/dist/ directory which contains pre-extracted C code.
